name: Anti-G-LOC tolerance
summary: How long a wearer resists G-induced loss-of-consciousness in high-acceleration environments. Tracked by the StatGrav stat.
modderHint: Modders adjusting this typically edit threshold-shifting conditions (Thresh<X>), not the stat itself.

name: Atrophy / Microgravity Muscle Loss
summary: Muscles atrophy in microgravity unless exercised ~2 hrs/day. Tracked by StatAtrophy. Hidden from the needs panel until it crosses into a Dc* discomfort tier (nDisplaySelf: 0).
modderHint: Tick effects driving the rate live in loot/CONDTick1HourPhysio (rise) and loot/CONDTick1HourWorkPhysio (work-time offset). Drug suppression: loot/CONDOssifexStimPer.

name: Hunger — short-term
summary: Moment-to-moment fullness. Tracked by StatSatiety. Independent from StatFood, which tracks cumulative malnutrition. Most mods that 'suppress hunger' want both.
modderHint: Suppress via ThreshStatSatiety on a granted condition; rate-suppress via -StatFoodRate on the malnutrition side.

name: Malnutrition / cumulative hunger
summary: Long-term nutrition tracker. StatFood has no Thresh<X> handle in the base game — suppression mods slow the rate via -StatFoodRate instead.
modderHint: Pair with StatSatiety changes — players think of hunger as one need; the data splits it in two.

name: Thirst / Hydration
summary: Crew dehydrate continuously and must drink to refill. Tracked by StatHydration; rate-modifiable via StatHydrationRate.

name: Sleep
summary: Sleep accumulates while awake; depletes while in a sleep interaction. Tracked by StatSleep. Comfort during sleep is a sibling stat (StatSleepComfort).

name: Fatigue
summary: Generic exhaustion stat — different from sleep need. Tracked by StatFatigue; healing rate via StatFatigueHealRate; multiplier via StatFatigueCoeff.

name: Hygiene
summary: Cleanliness need. Tracked by StatHygiene. Refilled by sink/hygiene-station interactions (CTTestThem: TIsHygieneWater).

name: Bowels / Defecate
summary: Tracked by StatDefecate. Refilled by toilet interactions.

name: Pain
summary: Pain stat — accumulates from injuries and damage. Tracked by StatPain.

name: Encumbrance
summary: How much the crew is carrying relative to their capacity. Tracked by StatEncumbrance.
